name: classify_text
description: Classify text into categories using zero-shot classification models. Provide candidate labels and the model assigns confidence scores to each, enabling flexible categorization without training data.

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The classification model ID in 'org/model' format.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Classification parameters including candidate_labels (required array of category strings) and multi_label (boolean).
